name: Shattered Glass Optimus, Jazz, and Prowl
description:
Optimus Prime wanted to reward his two loyal dogs, Prowl and Jazz, for their hard work being his loyal guards along with acting as his Third & Second in Commands. And he knew just the reward they deserve; a taste of his favorite toy, You.

--

Enjoy your meal, you hungry greedy robot fuckers!<3/p
creator: IvoryFate
